senses.definition: thin slices of salted or smoked pork, often fried and eaten in meals

examples.x: He cooked crispy bacon to accompany his scrambled eggs for breakfast.
He made a bacon and cheese sandwich for a quick and satisfying lunch.
I cooked bacon to add a smoky flavor to my homemade baked beans.
She avoids eating bacon as part of her vegetarian diet.
The café serves bacon as a topping for their gourmet burgers.

senses.definition: the meat such as beef and lamb that turn brown when cooked

examples.x: He grilled a juicy steak, savoring the flavor of the perfectly cooked red meat.
I opted for a lean cut of red meat, such as sirloin, to create a delicious and healthy stir-fry.
He enjoys his burgers made with ground red meat, seasoned with herbs and spices for flavor.
The butcher offers a variety of cuts of red meat, including ribeye, tenderloin, and brisket.
She grilled skewers of marinated red meat for a barbecue party with friends.

senses.definition: the meat such as chicken, rabbit, etc., that is pale in color

examples.x: She cooked a flavorful and aromatic curry, using diced white meat as the main ingredient.
She prepared a healthy and satisfying turkey sandwich, using slices of lean white meat as the filling.
She prefers to eat white meat over red meat for its lower fat content and milder flavor.
He cooked a pot of creamy soup using chunks of white meat, carrots, and celery.

senses.definition: meat from the wing of a duck, chicken, etc., eaten as food
meat of a young cow

examples.x: They enjoyed a refreshing summer salad with grilled veal, mixed greens and seasonal fruits.
She purchased ground veal to make homemade meatballs for spaghetti night.
She grilled veal for dinner, marinating it in a savory herb mixture for added flavor.

senses.definition: meat of a turkey, eaten as food, especially during holidays like Thanksgiving and Christmas

examples.x: He smoked a whole turkey and served it with a tangy barbecue sauce.
Thanksgiving is never complete without the aroma of a succulent turkey.
They grilled turkey burgers and served them with a side of sweet potato fries.

senses.definition: a piece of meat with one or more rib bones

examples.x: She visited a renowned steakhouse and savored a mouthwatering plate of grilled lamb ribs.
They hosted a backyard cookout, serving mouthwatering ribs that were a hit with their guests.
He grilled a rack of ribs for the barbecue, marinated in a tangy barbecue sauce.
She ordered a half rack of baby back ribs, glazed with a sweet and spicy sauce.
He enjoys smoking ribs on his backyard smoker, using a blend of hardwoods for a smoky flavor.

senses.definition: meat from a rabbit, eaten as food

examples.x: She carefully prepared a flavorful rabbit stew, using fresh herbs and vegetables to enhance its natural taste.
They decided to try something new for dinner and opted for a roasted rabbit
The chef prepared a traditional French dish of rabbit in mustard sauce, served with crusty bread.
The chef prepared a gourmet tasting menu featuring rabbit as the main course, paired with seasonal vegetables and sauces.

senses.definition: a ball of ground meat, served mostly hot in a sauce

examples.x: She made homemade meatballs from scratch for the spaghetti dinner, using a blend of ground beef and pork.
The chef created a vegetarian version of meatballs using lentils and mushrooms as the base.
She baked turkey meatballs in the oven until golden brown and served them with a tangy barbecue glaze.
He ordered a side of meatballs as an appetizer, served with a spicy tomato dipping sauce.

senses.definition: any sea creature that is eaten as food such as fish, shrimp, seaweed, and shellfish

examples.x: She's a seafood aficionado, specializing in preparing sushi and sashimi at home.
He enjoys dining on fresh seafood at the beachside restaurant, choosing from a variety of fish and shellfish.
He's on a seafood diet, preferring to eat only seafood dishes for their health benefits and delicious flavors.
The coastal town is known for its abundance of fresh seafood, attracting food enthusiasts from far and wide.
They enjoyed a seafood feast on the beach, with platters of shrimp, oysters, and grilled fish.

senses.definition: the nutritional, edible flesh of shellfish like clams, lobster, mussels, shrimp, crabs, etc.
the meat of a lobster as food

examples.x: She ordered a whole lobster and cracked it open to reveal the tender meat inside.
He enjoyed a lobster roll by the seaside.
The lobster was boiled and served with melted butter for dipping.

senses.definition: cow's meat that has been finely chopped or ground using a machine or grinder

examples.x: He enjoys making his own hamburgers from scratch, starting with grinding the beef himself.
The chef used freshly ground hamburger in the chili con carne recipe, adding depth and richness to the dish.
He prefers to season his hamburger with a blend of spices before shaping them into patties for grilling.
The recipe calls for a pound of hamburger to be mixed with onions and breadcrumbs for meatballs.
She bought a package of frozen hamburger to use in tonight's dinner.

senses.definition: the meat of a crab that can be eaten

examples.x: She prepared a delightful crab salad, combining chunks of sweet crab meat with crisp vegetables.
The seafood buffet offered a selection of crab dishes, from crab legs to crab salad.
He enjoyed a platter of chilled crab, served with cocktail sauce and lemon wedges.
He cooked a simple pasta dish with fresh crab, tossed in a garlic and herb butter sauce.
She savored the delicate flavor of crab, enjoying its sweet and tender meat.

senses.definition: a type of shellfish that can be eaten both raw and cooked, some of which contain pearls inside

examples.x: Bake oysters topped with a mixture of breadcrumbs, butter, and herbs for a delightful and easy-to-make appetizer.
He harvested wild oysters from the rocky shoreline, using a shucking knife to pry open the shells and reveal the succulent meat inside.
She ordered a dozen raw oysters as an appetizer, served with mignonette sauce and freshly grated horseradish.
She found a beautiful pearl inside the oyster she was eating at the beach.

senses.definition: a large cut of meat from the area where two or more bones meet, typically including a part of the bone

examples.x: I would like to have sandwiches made with thinly sliced turkey joint for lunch.
My dad grilled a succulent pork joint with barbecue sauce for a backyard cookout.
She purchased a beef joint from the butcher, intending to roast it for Sunday dinner.

senses.definition: a type of meat cut from a pig's thigh, usually smoked or salted

examples.x: He diced the leftover ham and used it to make a flavorful fried rice.
She sliced the ham into thin strips and added it to her pasta dish.
She prepared a glazed ham for the holiday feast, baking it with a sweet and savory glaze until golden brown.
He enjoys sandwiches made with thinly sliced ham and Swiss cheese, stacked between slices of fresh bread.
The butcher sells a variety of hams, including smoked, honey-glazed, and spiral-cut options.

senses.definition: the soft part of the body of an animal, between the skin and bones

examples.x: He prepared a mouthwatering dish with the tender and flavorful flesh of the lamb.
The roasted duck had a crispy skin and succulent flesh.
The butcher carefully trimmed the excess fat from the flesh of the meat before packaging it for sale.
She marinated the chicken breasts overnight to infuse the flesh with flavor before grilling them.
The predator tore into the flesh of its prey, devouring the meat with voracious hunger.

senses.definition: meat of a duck, eaten as food

examples.x: They marinated the duck in an Asian-inspired sauce and grilled it to perfection.
She roasted a whole duck for the family dinner, seasoned with herbs and spices for added flavor.
He's allergic to poultry, so he avoids dishes containing duck to prevent allergic reactions.
The roasted duck was served with a side of wild rice pilaf, creating a satisfying and elegant meal.
She prepared a rustic duck stew, simmering duck legs with onions, carrots, and potatoes in a rich broth.

senses.definition: a piece of meat cut from the body of an animal

examples.x: I was enjoying every single cut of marinated chicken, beef, and pork.
She purchased a tenderloin cut from the butcher, intending to grill it for dinner.

senses.definition: meat cut from the front part of the body of a bird

examples.x: The butcher sells boneless duck breasts, perfect for pan-searing or roasting.
They enjoyed a hearty meal of roasted pheasant breast, served with a savory cranberry sauce.
The chef prepared a gourmet dish of quail breast stuffed with wild mushrooms and herbs.

senses.definition: meat of a goose, eaten as food

examples.x: He roasted a plump goose for his family's Thanksgiving dinner.
She slow-cooked a goose in a savory broth with herbs and root vegetables.
For Christmas dinner, they roasted a succulent goose and served it with cranberry sauce and roasted vegetables.
The restaurant's specialty was crispy-skinned goose, served with a tangy orange glaze and crispy roast potatoes.

senses.definition: a type of hard cheese with many holes
any type of cheese containing blue lines or mold

examples.x: Blue cheese and bacon make an irresistible combination in a creamy spinach salad.
I love the combination of blue cheese and pears in a salad.
Spread a layer of blue cheese on your burger for an extra burst of flavor.

senses.definition: a type of hard yellow cheese from Cheddar, England

examples.x: Cheddar cheese is a must-have ingredient for a classic cheeseburger.
I love to make a grilled cheese sandwich with Cheddar cheese.
The Cheddar cheese melted perfectly on top of the homemade lasagna.

senses.definition: a type of smooth soft cheese that is made from whole milk and cream

examples.x: I love spreading cream cheese on my toasted bagel in the morning.
One of my favorite desserts is a creamy cheesecake made with cream cheese.
She whipped together cream cheese, powdered sugar, and vanilla extract to make a fluffy frosting for carrot cake.
He used cream cheese as a base for homemade dips, blending it with herbs and spices for a flavorful appetizer.
She spread cream cheese on a bagel for breakfast, topping it with smoked salmon and capers.

senses.definition: a yellow, round cheese from the Netherlands

examples.x: Gouda has a mild and slightly nutty flavor.
He brought back a souvenir of Gouda from his trip to the Netherlands, a round cheese wrapped in wax.
The cheese board featured a variety of cheeses, including aged Gouda with its nutty flavor and firm texture.
She picked up a wheel of Gouda from the cheese shop to serve at her dinner party.
They enjoyed a picnic in the park with a loaf of crusty bread and a wedge of Gouda.

senses.definition: the yellow part of an egg that is surrounded by a liquid

examples.x: She separated the egg white from the yolk to use in different parts of the recipe.
She cracked open the egg, careful not to break the yolk, and added it to the frying pan.
The omelette was filled with cheese and diced vegetables, with the yolk still slightly runny in the center.
He prefers his boiled eggs with a soft yolk, perfect for dipping toast soldiers.

senses.definition: the liquid part of an egg that when cooked turns white

examples.x: The omelette was cooked until the white was just set, with the yolk still slightly runny in the center.
She watched as the white of the egg slowly solidified in the frying pan, turning from translucent to opaque.
They admired the delicate swirls of white in the poached egg as it floated in the simmering water.
He separated the yolk from the white of the egg, carefully pouring the white into a separate bowl.
He carefully removed any traces of eggshell from the white before adding it to the mixing bowl.
